series_metadata.series_title: Money Follows the Person (MFP) and Program Contract Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: MFP HOME Choice and Ohio Access Success records of BHCS home and community-based services programs and waivers, including but not limited to: Request for Proposal and related documentation,ODJFS contract and related documentation, contract amendments, quality management plans and reports, contract deliverable reports and responses, contracts invoices, contracts expenditures, task tracking documents, and quarterly and semi-annual reporting documentations to CMS.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: receipt of final payment or any audit findings or lawsuits Have been resolved. ; Paper: in office 60 days imaging and
